title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.235 - Preparation of marking devices required
text:
115.235.  Preparation of marking devices required. — In jurisdictions where electronic voting systems are used, the election authority shall cause the marking devices to be put in order, set, adjusted and made ready for voting, before they are delivered to polling places on election day.
(L. 1977 H.B. 101 § 8.035) 
Effective 1-01-78
